privileged_info_summary: The mail merge task uses synthetic data created during setup. The CSV data source at /home/ga/Documents/patrons.csv contains 5 patron records with names: Eleanor Vance, Santiago Nasar, Clarissa Dalloway, Jay Gatsby, and Atticus Finch. The template at /home/ga/Documents/letter_template.docx uses 6 placeholders: {Name}, {Address}, {City}, {State}, {BookTitle}, and {DueDate}. All book titles correctly correspond to their associated literary characters' source works. The output file is expected at /home/ga/Documents/merged_letters.docx. The data is synthetically generated inline during task setup using python-docx for the template and embedded CSV creation via bash heredoc.
